samples.xml_description:
Implement a right shifter. Clock. Input signal to be right-shifted. Output signal representing the result of the right shift operation. Width of the input and output signals. sequential_logic Clock signal used for synchronous operation. Input signal to be right-shifted. Output signal representing the result of the right shift operation.

Initialize the q register to 0 using the initial statement.

On each rising edge of the clock, right-shift the contents of the q register by 1 bit using the >> operator.

Insert the new input bit d into the most significant position of the register.

Assign the value of the input signal to the most significant bit (MSB) of the register: q[7] <= d.
